authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (Updated June 1, 2026) — CDFW
Cal. Code Regs. Tit. 14, § 7.40 — Alphabetical List of Hatchery Trout, Hatchery Steelhead, and Salmon Waters with Special Fishing Regulations
sources.quotedText: (69) Navarro River (Mendocino Co.). Also see Section 8.00(b) Low-Flow Restrictions. Main stem below the Greenwood Road bridge. Fourth Sat. in May through Mar. 31. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from the fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 31. Only barbless hooks may be used from Nov. 1 through Mar. 31. 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

sources.title: California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 229433, "Navarro River", Stream, Mendocino Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":229433,"gaz_name":"Navarro River","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mendocino"} — geometry multipoint; first point (Web Mercator -13777027.0165, 4749229.8671) converts to lon -123.761139, lat 39.192129, at the river's mouth near Navarro, replacing the file's previous coordinate (-123.4900, 39.0800), which was off by ~26.5 km.

parameters.note: This open period spans the calendar-year boundary: fourth Sat. in May of one year through Mar. 31 of the next. Also see 14 CCR §8.00(b) Low-Flow Restrictions, which can trigger additional closures.

regulations.humanSummary: Open fourth Saturday in May through March 31, main stem below the Greenwood Road bridge. Also subject to §8.00(b) low-flow closures.
regulations.verbatimText: Also see Section 8.00(b) Low-Flow Restrictions. Main stem below the Greenwood Road bridge. Fourth Sat. in May through Mar. 31.

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from the fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 31. Only barbless hooks (bait permitted) may be used from Nov. 1 through Mar. 31.

regulations.humanSummary: Artificial lures with barbless hooks only from the fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 31; barbless hooks only (bait allowed) from Nov. 1 through Mar. 31.
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used from the fourth Sat. in May through Oct. 31. Only barbless hooks may be used from Nov. 1 through Mar. 31.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily; 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead in possession. Only fish marked as hatchery-produced (adipose fin clipped, per the ** footnote) may be retained.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead daily; 4 in possession, main stem below the Greenwood Road bridge.
regulations.verbatimText: 2 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead **. 4 hatchery trout or hatchery steelhead ** in possession.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
